name: Incline Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
description: Set an adjustable bench to ~45° incline facing away from a HIGH cable pulley. Grip rope or bar, sit back on the bench. Start with hands near chest (elbows bent), then extend arms forward/overhead against the cable resistance. The high cable angle creates a deep stretch on both the lats and the triceps long head. Works primarily lats with significant tricep long head activation. Can also be replicated kneeling at a cable column (position 1) facing away. Note: different from a standard LOW cable overhead tricep extension, which isolates triceps more.

media.caption: Coach Francis incline cable overhead extension demo — HIGH cable, 45° bench, lat + tricep long head
